overall.description: Driving through a concrete highway tunnel in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), illuminated by linear fluorescent lights. The vehicle navigates a gentle curve while encountering sparse oncoming traffic, then approaches and exits into a neon-lit city at night with palm trees visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight concrete highway tunnel with linear fluorescent lighting

events.description: dark sedan with headlights on approaches and passes on the left in the opposite lane
second vehicle overtakes on the left side in the adjacent lane

agents.ego_description: driving straight through the tunnel at steady speed in the right lane

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving in the opposite direction, passing by quickly with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: grey concrete wall with vertical panel seams running parallel to the road
grey concrete wall with vertical panel seams running parallel to the road
long white fluorescent tubes mounted on the ceiling in a regular repeating pattern
dark asphalt pavement with double yellow center lines and single yellow edge lines

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight through a narrow concrete tunnel illuminated by overhead fluorescent tubes. The grey walls flank both sides with vertical seams, and the asphalt road stretches ahead with clear yellow markings. Sparse oncoming traffic passes by in the opposite lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved section of concrete tunnel with ongoing traffic

events.description: road begins curving gently to the right, changing from straight alignment
blue sports car with glowing accents overtakes on the left side in the adjacent lane
red vehicle approaches and passes on the left in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: navigating the gentle right curve of the tunnel while maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: blue sports car with glowing blue accents overtaking quickly in the left lane

segments.scene_description: The tunnel road curves gently to the right while the vehicle maintains its course. The concrete walls and fluorescent lighting continue uninterrupted. Several vehicles pass by, including a distinctive blue sports car that overtakes in the left lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit approach transitioning to urban street

events.description: tunnel exit becomes visible ahead with natural night light and city illumination from outside
vehicle approaches the tunnel exit and begins emerging into the city environment with buildings and palm trees visible

agents.ego_description: approaching the tunnel exit and preparing to emerge into the city night environment

entered.detail: rectangular tunnel exit frame showing bright city lights and modern buildings beyond
illuminated modern buildings with neon lighting visible through the tunnel exit
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky outside the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the end of the tunnel as the exit opening comes into view, revealing a night cityscape with illuminated buildings and palm trees. The artificial fluorescent lighting gives way to mixed lighting from the city outside as the tunnel walls converge toward the exit frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sterile concrete tunnel that gradually opens into a vibrant, neon-lit night cityscape. It begins with the vehicle driving straight along an asphalt road flanked by grey walls and overhead fluorescent tubes, passing sparse oncoming traffic. As the road curves gently to the right, the camera maintains its course while other vehicles, including a distinctive blue sports car, weave through the lanes. The scene then shifts as the tunnel walls converge toward a brightening exit, where the artificial fluorescent glow gives way to the mixed illumination of the city. Finally, the vehicle emerges from the tunnel into the open night, revealing a skyline of glowing buildings and silhouettes of palm trees.
